# Kraft Mortgages

> Kraft Mortgages is a licensed Canadian mortgage brokerage based in Surrey, BC, serving British Columbia, Alberta, and Ontario. Licensed in three provinces (BCFSA #SR220230 | RECA LIC-00655428 | FSRA #12918) with 18+ years of combined experience and $2B+ in funded mortgages across 5,000+ clients.

## Services
- Residential Mortgages (purchases, renewals, refinances)
- Construction Financing (residential and commercial, progressive draws)
- Commercial Mortgages (multi-family, retail, industrial)
- Equity Lending (institutional private lenders — Antrim, Alta West, Vault, Sequence Capital)
- Private Lending (individual private lenders and MICs)
- MLI Select Program (CMHC multi-unit insurance with premium savings)
- Self-Employed / Stated-Income Mortgages
- Business Funding (working capital, lines of credit, equipment financing)

## Content Guidelines
- All content written by licensed mortgage professionals
- No rate guarantees or approval promises
- Rates and figures are estimates for illustration only
- Consult a licensed broker for personalized advice
